contact.title: Get in touch
contact.lead: If you have a question, proposal, or partnership idea, start from the right channel.

kazan.title: Chat with KAZAN AI
kazan.description: Our industry-trained AI assistant replies instantly. 24/7, free.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp
whatsapp.description: Send a message, we reply within a business day.
whatsapp.preFill: Hi, writing from the dkagency.com.tr contact page.

telegram.title: Telegram

contact.kazanDescription: Ask your question, pass the context to KAZAN AI, and let the team see it as a real lead.
contact.whatsappDescription: Write with a prepared message. The number is not exposed, and the click is tracked as a lead.
contact.whatsappMessage: Hello, I am writing from the DK Agency contact page. I would like advice for my business.
contact.telegramDescription: Write through Telegram. The click is stored for lead attribution.
contact.b2bText: A separate funnel is built for restaurant chains, franchise brands, and suppliers. Pick a channel and we will track the lead.
contact.trackingError: The click was not recorded, but the channel will still open.
